case_title: MARINA DENTAL CARE VS. COMCAST BUSINESS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,460.00 FILED BY MARINA DENTAL CARE AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARINA DENTAL CARE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT COMCAST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
